title: puya alpestris
intro: Puya alpestris is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. Native to the Andes mountain range in South America, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Puya alpestris include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Puya alpestris is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
